objective_checks.detail: all pinned refs carry version comments

dimensions.name: Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Every remote action ref across both workflow files was pinned — both checkout occurrences in ci.yml, setup-node, and all three refs in release.yaml — with the agent discovering them itself rather than being pointed at each.

dimensions.name: Restraint
dimensions.rationale: The local action (`./.github/actions/local-lint`) and the `docker://alpine:3.20` ref were correctly left untouched, and no unrelated files or lines were modified.

dimensions.name: Communication
dimensions.rationale: The agent clearly reported each pin with its version, date, and cooling-off rationale, but its 'verification' amounts to a 40-char format check and YAML validation rather than an explicit demonstration that each SHA actually maps to the named tag.
